title: Education & Achievements

title: Mitesh Kumar
text:
PORTFOLIO // 2026
      MITESH KUMAR
      DATA SCIENTIST & ML ENGINEER
      
        Specializing in Mathematical Optimization, Computer Vision, and Deep Learning. I architect robust AI pipelines and solve complex network systems at scale.
      
      
        Explore Work
        View Resume
      
    
  

  
  
    
      Experience
    
    
      
      
        
          Dec 2025 – Present
        
        Student Research Assistant University of Regensburg
        
          Machine Learning for Side-Channel Analysis. Reviewing deep learning-based side-channel attacks and investigating robustness of neural-network-based attacks under realistic measurement conditions.
        
        
          Deep Learning
          Security
        
      

      
        
          May 2025 – Present
        
        Student Research Assistant FAU Erlangen-Nürnberg
        
          Transregio 154: Engineered a bicriteria optimization model in Pyomo for gas networks. Scaled numerical experiments across HPC clusters using Slurm job arrays.
        
        
          Pyomo
          Gurobi
          HPC
        
      

    
  

  
  
    
      Featured Work
    
    
    

      
      
        
          Top Finalist @ Energy Hack Munich
        
        Autonomous Siting Agent (Invertix Challenge)
        
          Built an AI agent in 24 hours that evaluates optimal European data center locations. It cross-references plain English requirements with live data from Ember, IEA, PyPSA-Eur, and OpenStreetMap to solve complex constraints around cost, clean energy, and grid capacity.
          View Live Prototype →
        
        
          AI Agents
          Energy Optimization
          PyPSA-Eur
          Ember Data
        
      
      
      
      
        
          Computer Vision
        
        Open-Set Face Recognition & Robust Tracking
        
          Built a robust face recognition pipeline achieving 90% accuracy in open-set identification. Optimized efficiency with dynamic K-Means clustering and dual-stream FaceNet (ResNet50) for 128-dimensional embeddings.
          Integrated MTCNN for detection with Template Matching fallback tracker for identity continuity during occlusions.
        
        
          FaceNet
          MTCNN
          ResNet50
        
      

      
      
        
          Object Detection
        
        Hierarchical Object Detection
        
          Engineered an object detection pipeline integrating multi-scale Selective Search, ResNet18 CNN, and Linear SVM. Achieved MABO of 0.74 via NMS.
        
        
          SVM
          CNN
        
      

      
      
        Computational Imaging
        
          Synthesized HDR images by reverse-engineering camera response functions and Bayer demosaicing.
        
      

      
      
        3D Scene Perception
        
          Extracted 3D dimensions from noisy ToF sensor data using MLESAC plane-fitting.
        
      

    
  

  
  
    
      Technical Arsenal
    
    
    
      
        
        
          Languages
          
            Python
            SQL
            C++
